task: On saucedemo.com, log in with the user standard_user and the password referenced by the environment variable SAUCE_PASSWORD (in the plan, use value_ref "ENV:SAUCE_PASSWORD" in the password field instead of the literal value), add the item 'Sauce Labs Backpack' to the cart, go to the cart, go to checkout, fill in first name João, last name Silva, ZIP code 01000-000, continue, finish the purchase and verify the order-completed message (text 'Thank you for your order').
